n0:createOracleTrigger.n0:source:
CREATE OR REPLACE EDITIONABLE TRIGGER "%USER_NAME%"."DEMO_ORDER_ITEMS_AIUD_TOTAL" after insert or update or delete on demo_order_items begin -- Update the Order Total when any order item is changed update demo_orders set order_total = (select sum(unit_price*quantity) from demo_order_items where demo_order_items.order_id = demo_orders.order_id); end;
/
